# Purpose
The file includes the contents of the `CHANGES.rst` file located in the parent directory. This inclusion allows the documentation to display the change log or release notes from `CHANGES.rst` within the current document. The `.. include::` directive is used in reStructuredText to incorporate external files into the document.
